text:
# `mxlpy.types`

Types Module.

This module provides type definitions and utility types for use throughout the project.
It includes type aliases for arrays, numbers, and callable functions, as well as re-exports
of common types from standard libraries.

Classes:
    DerivedFn: Callable type for derived functions.
    Array: Type alias for numpy arrays of float64.
    Number: Type alias for float, list of floats, or numpy arrays.
    Param: Type alias for parameter specifications.
    RetType: Type alias for return types.
    Axes: Type alias for numpy arrays of matplotlib axes.
    ArrayLike: Type alias for numpy arrays or lists of floats.

## Classes

### class `Annotation`

MIRIAM annotation linking a model component to an ontology identifier.

Attributes
----------
uri
    Resource identifier, typically an ``identifiers.org`` URL
    (e.g. ``"https://identifiers.org/uniprot:P00533"``).
predicate
    MIRIAM qualifier relating the component to the resource. Biological
    qualifiers (``bqbiol``) apply to components, model qualifiers
    (``bqmodel``) apply to the model itself.

### class `Derived`

Container for a derived value.

**Methods**

- `calculate(self, args: dict[str, Any]) -> float` ‚Äî Calculate the derived value.
- `calculate_inpl(self, name: str, args: dict[str, Any]) -> None` ‚Äî Calculate the derived value in place.

### class `FitFailure`

Custom exception.

### class `InitialAssignment`

Container for a derived value.

**Methods**

- `calculate(self, args: dict[str, Any]) -> float` ‚Äî Calculate the derived value.
- `calculate_inpl(self, name: str, args: dict[str, Any]) -> None` ‚Äî Calculate the derived value in place.

### class `IntegrationFailure`

Custom exception.

### class `NoSteadyState`

Custom exception.

### class `Option`

Generic Option type.

**Methods**

- `unwrap_or_err(self) -> T` ‚Äî Obtain value if Ok, else raise exception.
- `default(self, fn: Callable[[], T]) -> T` ‚Äî Obtain value if Ok, else create default one.

### class `OscillationDetected`

Raised when oscillatory behaviour is detected during steady-state search.

Attributes
----------
oscillating_species
    Names of the variables exhibiting oscillatory behaviour.
period
    Estimated oscillation period in simulation time units, or ``None``
    if it could not be determined.

### class `Parameter`

Container for parameter meta information.

### class `Reaction`

Container for a reaction.

**Methods**

- `get_modifiers(self, model: Model) -> list[str]` ‚Äî Get the modifiers of the reaction.
- `calculate(self, args: dict[str, Any]) -> float` ‚Äî Calculate the derived value.
- `calculate_inpl(self, name: str, args: dict[str, Any]) -> None` ‚Äî Calculate the reaction in place.

### class `Readout`

Container for a readout.

**Methods**

- `calculate(self, args: dict[str, Any]) -> float` ‚Äî Calculate the derived value.
- `calculate_inpl(self, name: str, args: dict[str, Any]) -> None` ‚Äî Calculate the reaction in place.

### class `Result`

Generic Result type.

**Methods**

- `unwrap_or_err(self) -> T` ‚Äî Obtain value if Ok, else raise exception.
- `default(self, fn: Callable[[], T]) -> T` ‚Äî Obtain value if Ok, else create default one.

### class `SerializationError`

Raised when a model cannot be serialised to the native JSON format.

### class `Variable`

Container for variable meta information.
